content:
# Tiered Knowledge RFC — Final Design Decisions (March 2026)

## Status: Design Complete, 5-persona reviewed (2 rounds), ready for implementation

## Key Design Choices (Final)
1. 5 memory types: Structural (α=0), Procedural (α=0.10), Decisional (α=0.15), Analytical (α=0.30), Episodic (α=0.60)
2. 4 tiers: Hot → Warm → Cold (reversible, deferred promotion via GC) → Forgotten (archive only)
3. Additive composite formula: 0.35×D + 0.30×A + 0.20×G + 0.15×C
4. Power-law decay D(t) = (1+t)^(-α), time since creation
5. Hysteresis thresholds: demotion/promotion gap of 0.10
6. Supersession penalty: 0.5× on final score if superseded_by is set
7. Cold→Warm promotion: deferred to GC cycle (not synchronous), avoids ArcSwap mutation complexity
8. ArcSwap<Hnsw> for lock-free reads, blue-green rebuild via store()
9. Inactivity policy: score-aware (exempt if score >= 0.60), last_accessed=None falls back to recorded_at
10. Budget policy: pinned excluded from count, auto-protected can't go below Warm, one-tier-step-per-cycle
11. Archive-only compaction in v1, no LLM dependency
12. Full observability: span constants (corvia.gc.*), structured transition log, GC metrics, MCP tools, dashboard, CLI, rollback plan

## RFC Location
repos/corvia/docs/rfcs/2026-03-27-tiered-knowledge-design.md (721 lines)
